dag.dag_name: Forecasting in-memory ensemble blend exhausts worker memory

tasks.dependencies: Estimates peak resource usage from row-count metadata before compute
Resource-intensive in-memory computation, historically prone to exhaustion
Checks actual peak usage against budget mid-run/post-run
Branch: resource usage within safe budget
Branch: near resource ceiling, reroutes to chunked processing
Logs final resource profile for trend monitoring

incident.incident_name: Forecasting in-memory ensemble blend exhausts worker memory
incident.description: Resource Exhaustion incident on the Customers pipeline (RTL_CUS_RES): forecasting in-memory ensemble blend exhausts worker memory.
incident.symptoms: The weekly forecast ensemble-blend task, running as a single large pandas operation, consistently pegs worker memory at 95-100% and occasionally gets OOM-killed.
incident.root_cause: The task loads all SKU-cluster forecasts into a single in-memory DataFrame (regional exclusives expansion pushed this to ~19GB) on a worker sized for 16GB, with no chunking strategy.
incident.business_impact: When OOM-killed, the entire weekly forecast cycle must restart from the blend step, costing 2+ hours of reprocessing and risking missing the replenishment planning deadline.
incident.resolution: Chunk the blend operation by SKU cluster with dynamic task mapping, each chunk sized to fit comfortably in worker memory; alternatively move to Dask for out-of-core processing.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The task loads all SKU-cluster forecasts into a single in-memory DataFrame (regional exclusives expansion pushed this to ~19GB) on a worker sized for 16GB, with no chunking strategy.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow task logs show the same failure signature (OOMKilled) recurring across multiple historical runs when SKU count crosses a threshold
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog container.memory.usage sustained above 90% for the task's full duration, spiking to OOMKilled on bad weeks
expected_rca.resolution: Chunk the blend operation by SKU cluster with dynamic task mapping, each chunk sized to fit comfortably in worker memory; alternatively move to Dask for out-of-core processing.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add a memory-budget estimation step to the DAG factory that computes expected peak memory from historical row-count-per-byte ratios and rejects unchunked designs above a configurable threshold.
